picks.title: Exit... Pursued by a Bear
picks.why: Lauren Gunderson's Exit... Pursued by a Bear runs Thu-Sat 8pm, Sun 2pm through May 17—catch it Sun, May 10 2:00 PM at Santa Clara University, free.

picks.title: Poetry Open Mic — Poetry Month Celebration
picks.why: Poetry Open Mic celebration in Cupertino on Sun, May 10 3:00 PM—multilingual, multigenerational voices hosted by the Poet Laureate, free.

picks.title: Academy of Classical Ballet: The Four Seasons and Peter and the Wolf
picks.why: Academy of Classical Ballet performs The Four Seasons and Peter and the Wolf in Campbell on Sun, May 10 3:00 PM—spring showcase for all ages.

picks.title: Bay FC AANHPI Heritage Match
picks.why: Bay FC women's soccer celebrates AANHPI heritage with family activities on Sun, May 10 1:05 PM at PayPal Park—rare cultural sports event.

picks.title: FOPAL Book Sale
picks.why: FOPAL Book Sale on Sun, May 10 1:00 PM in Palo Alto features 70,000+ books, CDs, DVDs in three rooms—monthly treasure hunt, free.
